phrases.cultural_note: Les Halles is open every morning from 6am to 1pm. It's closed on Sundays and Mondays.

responses.phonetic: luh mah-TAN suhl-MAHN, zhoos-kah trez uhr trahnt
responses.local: Le matin seulement, jusqu'à treize heures trente.

phrases.cultural_note: Try the local olives, olive oil, herbs de Provence, and the famous Avignon chocolates.

responses.english: I recommend the olives, olive oil, herbs de Provence, and Avignon chocolates.
responses.phonetic: oh-zhoor-DWEE, on ah sur-TOO day pro-DWEE duh say-ZON
responses.local: Je recommande les olives, l'huile d'olive, les herbes de Provence et les chocolats d'Avignon.

phrases.intent_en: Ask for a taste of olive oil
phrases.cultural_note: Many vendors offer samples. Provence produces excellent olive oils — look for the AOC label.

responses.english: Yes, help yourself. Try this one.

phrases.text_local: Quel est le meilleur fromage du marché ?
phrases.pronunciation: kel eh leh may-YUHR from-AHJ doo mar-SHAY
phrases.cultural_note: Try the local chèvres (goat cheeses) from the region. The market has excellent fromageries.

responses.english: Try the fresh goat cheese, at the stand over there.
responses.phonetic: eh-say-YAY luh shev-ruh FREH, oh stahnd lah-BAH
responses.local: Essayez le chèvre frais, au stand là-bas.
